{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Courage
| aliases = Courage
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|formation of six flying swords}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura]] Courage is a member of the [[Akura clan]], a family where every individual is named after a specific virtue. Within combat settings, Courage has been assigned to work in a two-person team alongside Pride to provide support. In this role, Courage utilizes a formation consisting of six flying swords to assist Pride, who relies on [[Enforcer techniques]]. The character was discovered deceased on a staircase with swords scattered around the body.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A cousin to [[Grace]] and Douji, [[Akura]] Courage utilized a formation of six flying swords during his combat. Following a period where he lay unconscious with a mangled lower half of his body, he managed to shoot up the stairs. However, his journey ended abruptly when he was found dead upon those same stairs with his swords spilled around him.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Courage]] controls a formation of six flying swords.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Courage was unconscious with a mangled lower half of his body.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Courage is a cousin of [[Grace]] and Douji.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Courage shot up the stairs.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Courage]] was found dead on the stairs with his swords spilled around him.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
